questions.question: Cylindrical is polar + height.
questions.explanation: Yes! (r, θ, z) is like (r, θ) from polar with z added for vertical.

questions.question: What does z represent in cylindrical (r, θ, z)?
questions.explanation: z is always the vertical axis—height up or down.

questions.question: Cylindrical is perfect for rotating systems.
questions.explanation: Yes, spinning tops, vortexes, engines—all naturally cylindrical.
